tables.description: This TOPMed methylation sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected, histological type, tumor status, primary tissue type, UBERON ID and term, collection visit identifier and year, age at collection, analyte type (n=4 variables; type isolated, year isolated and lab), assay lab, sample shipment plate and well, data processing batch, Illumina chip Sentrix barcode, decode and extract dates, fraction of CpG sites which pass a detection p-value threshold of 0.05 and 0.01, and green and red .idat filenames and md5s.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of analyte to be measured from the submitted sample

variables.name: Age_at_collection
variables.description: Subject age at which primary biosample was collected

variables.name: Analyte_isolated
variables.description: Type of analyte isolated from primary biosample

variables.name: Analyte_isolation_lab
variables.description: Lab in which analyte was isolated from primary biosample

variables.name: Analyte_isolation_year
variables.description: Year in which analyte was isolated from primary biosample

variables.name: Assay_lab
variables.description: Name of assay lab to which the samples were sent

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: Collection_visit
variables.description: Study visit identifier at which primary biosample was collected

variables.name: Collection_year
variables.description: Year in which primary biosample was collected

variables.name: Grn.idat
variables.description: File name for Illumina's Grn .idat file

variables.name: Grn.md5
variables.description: Md5 checksum for Illumina's Grn .idat file

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Tissue sub-type or type of cellular or extra-cellular material derived from primary biosample

variables.name: Red.idat
variables.description: File name for Illumina's Red .idat file

variables.name: Red.md5
variables.description: Md5 checksum for Illumina's Red .idat file

variables.name: UBERON_ID
variables.description: UBERON ontology identifier for tissue type of the collected sample

variables.name: UBERON_Term
variables.description: UBERON ontology term for tissue type of the collected sample

variables.name: decodeDate
variables.description: Earliest date shown for 'AutoDecode' action in the .idat 'RunInfo' table. Presumably related to the chip manufacturing date.

variables.name: extractDate
variables.description: Earliest date shown for 'Scan', 'Register' and 'Extract' actions in the .idat 'RunInfo' table. Presumably date when the chip was scanned after hybridization, extension and staining.

variables.name: p.0.01
variables.description: Fraction of CpG sites which pass a detection p-value threshold of 0.01

variables.name: p.0.05
variables.description: Fraction of CpG sites which pass a detection p-value threshold of 0.05

tables.description: This TOPMed RNA-Seq sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected, histological type, tumor status, primary biosample type, UBERON ID and term, collection visit identifier and year, analyte type (n=4 variables; type isolated, year isolated and lab), assay lab, and age at collection.

variables.name: AGE_OF_COLLECTION
variables.description: Subject's age in years at time collection

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of TOPMed omics that was used for analysis; "DNA", RNA", Protein", "Metabolites"

variables.name: Analyte_isolation_lab
variables.description: Name of the omics center to which the samples were isolated

variables.name: Analyte_isolation_year
variables.description: Year sample was isolated for analysis my multiomics core

variables.name: Assay_lab
variables.description: Name of the omics center to which the samples were sent

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Anatomical site at which biosample was taken, e.g. "Nasal epithelium", "Venous Blood"

variables.name: Collection_visit
variables.description: Study visit when the primary biosample was collected (relevant for longitudianal studies with multiple waves of clinic visits).

variables.name: Collection_year
variables.description: Subject's age in years at time of tissue collection

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue subtype derived from the Primary biosample, or if no subfractionation was done, the primary biosample type; e.g. plasma for proteins and metabolites; PBMC, T-cell, or monocyte for RNA; blood buffy coat for DNA

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status of the sample. For non-cancer studies, all values should be "no". For cancer studies, values should be "yes" or "no". (NCBI Biosample characteristic)

variables.name: Primary_biosample_type
variables.description: Type of primary biosample, e.g. "venous blood", "lung epithelium"; be as specific as possible

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: TOPMed identifier for each sample aliquot sent to the assay center. MUST use TOPMed identifiers - TOR (RNA), TOP (protein), TOM (metabolite), TOE (DNA for methylation assay)

variables.name: UBERON_ID
variables.description: UBERON ontology identifier for type of primary biosample; value is "0013756" for venous blood, https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/uberon for others

variables.name: UBERON_Term
variables.description: UBERON ontology term for type of primary biosample, e.g. "venous blood", https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/uberon for others

tables.description: This TOPMed Broad metabolomics sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, histological type, tumor status, UBERON ID and term, assay lab, primary biosample type, sample container and well ID, and collection age, year, and visit.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of analyte to be measured

variables.name: Age_at_collection
variables.description: Subject's age in years at time of tissue collection

variables.name: Assay_lab
variables.description: Name of assay lab to which the samples were sent

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Anatomical site at which biosample was taken

variables.name: Collection_visit
variables.description: Study visit identifier for when the primary biosample was collected.

variables.name: Collection_year
variables.description: Year in which primary biosample was collected (informative for storage time)

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Tissue sub-type or type of cellular or extra-cellular material derived from primary biosample

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Identifier for aliquot of material or isolated analyte from which assay was performed

variables.name: Sample_container_ID
variables.description: Identifier for the sample shipment box

variables.name: Sample_well_ID
variables.description: Identifier for the row and column of the sample shipment box

variables.name: UBERON_ID
variables.description: UBERON ontology identifier for type of primary biosample

variables.name: UBERON_Term
variables.description: UBERON ontology term for type of primary biosample

tables.description: This TOPMed WGS sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, sequencing center, funding source, sequencing control indicator, and TOPMed phase, project, and study name.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CONTROL
variables.description: Statement whether or not sequencing controls were used and included within the data

variables.name: TOPMed_Phase
variables.description: TOPMed Phase for Whole Genome Sequencing

tables.description: This TOPMed Metabolon metabolomics sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, histological type, tumor status, primary biosample type, and collection age, year, and visit.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of omics assay to be performed, generally one of the following four values: "RNA", "DNA", "protein", or "metabolite"

variables.name: Age_at_collection
variables.description: Subject's age in years at time of tissue collection

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Anatomical site at which biosample was taken, e.g. "arm vein", "lung", "inner oral cavity"

variables.name: Collection_visit
variables.description: Study visit when the primary biosample was collected (relevant for longitudianal studies with multiple waves of clinic visits).

variables.name: Collection_year
variables.description: Year in which primary biosample was collected (informative for storage time)

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue subtype derived from the Primary biosample, or if no subfractionation was done, the primary biosample type; e.g. plasma for proteins and metabolites; PBMC, T-cell, or monocyte for RNA; blood buffy coat for DNA

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status of the sample. For non-cancer studies, all values should be "no". For cancer studies, values should be "yes" or "no". (NCBI Biosample characteristic)

variables.name: Primary_biosample_type
variables.description: Type of primary biosample, e.g. "venous blood", "lung epithelium"; be as specific as possible

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: TOPMed identifier for each sample aliquot sent to the assay center. MUST use TOPMed identifiers - TOR (RNA), TOP (protein), TOM (metabolite), TOE (DNA for methylation assay)

tables.description: The subject consent data table contains subject IDs, consent group information, and biological sex.

This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.
